description: Full ECS normalization for all Mordor/Wazuh dataset field variants

script.source: String basename(String p) { if (p == null) return null; String s = p.replace('\\', '/'); def parts = s.splitOnToken('/'); return parts[parts.length - 1]; } def pick(def d, def fields) { for (def f : fields) { if (d != null && d.containsKey(f) && d[f] != null && d[f].toString().length() > 0) { return d[f]; } } return null; } def d = ctx.containsKey('data') && ctx.data != null ? ctx.data : ctx; def ts = pick(d, ['@timestamp','TimeCreated','TimeGenerated','EventTime','UtcTime','EventReceivedTime']); if (ts != null && !ctx.containsKey('@timestamp')) { ctx['@timestamp'] = ts; } ctx['event'] = ctx['event'] ?: [:]; def eid = pick(d, ['EventID','event_id']); if (eid != null) ctx.event['code'] = eid.toString(); def eprov = pick(d, ['SourceName','EventSourceName','ProviderName','SourceSystem']); if (eprov != null) ctx.event['provider'] = eprov; def echan = pick(d, ['Channel','channel']); if (echan != null) ctx.event['dataset'] = echan; def eact = pick(d, ['EventType','Action','ActionName','Activity','OperationType']); if (eact != null) ctx.event['action'] = eact; def esev = pick(d, ['Severity','Level']); if (esev != null) ctx.event['severity'] = esev; def hn = pick(d, ['Hostname','Computer','WorkstationName','host','ComputerName']); if (hn != null) { ctx['host'] = ctx['host'] ?: [:]; ctx.host['hostname'] = hn; ctx.host['name'] = hn.splitOnToken('.')[0]; } ctx['process'] = ctx['process'] ?: [:]; def img = pick(d, ['Image','NewProcessName','ProcessName','ApplicationPath','Process']); if (img != null) { ctx.process['executable'] = img; ctx.process['name'] = basename(img); } if (!ctx.process.containsKey('name')) { def app = pick(d, ['Application']); if (app != null) { ctx.process['executable'] = app; ctx.process['name'] = basename(app); } } def cl = pick(d, ['CommandLine','ScriptBlockText']); if (cl != null) ctx.process['command_line'] = cl; def pid = pick(d, ['ProcessId','ProcessID','NewProcessId','pid']); if (pid != null) ctx.process['pid'] = pid.toString(); def pguid = pick(d, ['ProcessGuid','ProcessGUID']); if (pguid != null) ctx.process['entity_id'] = pguid; def il = pick(d, ['IntegrityLevel']); if (il != null) ctx.process['integrity_level'] = il; def orig = pick(d, ['OriginalFileName']); if (orig != null) ctx.process['pe'] = ['original_file_name': orig]; def hstr = pick(d, ['Hashes']); if (hstr != null) { ctx.process['hash'] = [:]; for (def h : hstr.splitOnToken(',')) { def kv = h.splitOnToken('='); if (kv.length == 2) ctx.process.hash[kv[0].toLowerCase()] = kv[1]; } } def pimg = pick(d, ['ParentImage','ParentProcessName','CallerProcessName']); if (pimg != null) { ctx.process['parent'] = ctx.process['parent'] ?: [:]; ctx.process.parent['executable'] = pimg; ctx.process.parent['name'] = basename(pimg); } def pcl = pick(d, ['ParentCommandLine']); if (pcl != null) { ctx.process['parent'] = ctx.process['parent'] ?: [:]; ctx.process.parent['command_line'] = pcl; } def ppid = pick(d, ['ParentProcessId','ParentProcessID','CallerProcessId']); if (ppid != null) { ctx.process['parent'] = ctx.process['parent'] ?: [:]; ctx.process.parent['pid'] = ppid.toString(); } def ppguid = pick(d, ['ParentProcessGuid','ParentProcessGUID']); if (ppguid != null) { ctx.process['parent'] = ctx.process['parent'] ?: [:]; ctx.process.parent['entity_id'] = ppguid; } def company = pick(d, ['Company']); def product = pick(d, ['Product']); def fver = pick(d, ['FileVersion']); def desc = pick(d, ['Description']); if (company != null || product != null || fver != null || desc != null) { ctx.process['pe'] = ctx.process['pe'] ?: [:]; if (company != null) ctx.process.pe['company'] = company; if (product != null) ctx.process.pe['product'] = product; if (fver != null) ctx.process.pe['file_version'] = fver; if (desc != null) ctx.process.pe['description'] = desc; } def uname = pick(d, ['SubjectUserName','AccountName','UserName','User']); def udomain = pick(d, ['SubjectDomainName','Domain']); def usid = pick(d, ['SubjectUserSid']); if (uname != null || udomain != null || usid != null) { ctx['user'] = ctx['user'] ?: [:]; if (uname != null) ctx.user['name'] = uname; if (udomain != null) ctx.user['domain'] = udomain; if (usid != null) ctx.user['id'] = usid; } def tuname = pick(d, ['TargetUserName']); def tudomain = pick(d, ['TargetDomainName']); def tusid = pick(d, ['TargetUserSid']); if (tuname != null || tudomain != null) { ctx['destination'] = ctx['destination'] ?: [:]; ctx.destination['user'] = [:]; if (tuname != null) ctx.destination.user['name'] = tuname; if (tudomain != null) ctx.destination.user['domain'] = tudomain; if (tusid != null) ctx.destination.user['id'] = tusid; } def dip = pick(d, ['DestinationIp','DestAddress','dest_ip']); def dport = pick(d, ['DestinationPort','DestPort','dest_port']); def dhost = pick(d, ['DestinationHostname']); if (dip != null || dport != null || dhost != null) { ctx['destination'] = ctx['destination'] ?: [:]; if (dip != null) ctx.destination['ip'] = dip; if (dport != null) ctx.destination['port'] = dport.toString(); if (dhost != null) ctx.destination['domain'] = dhost; } def sip = pick(d, ['SourceIp','SourceAddress','src_ip','IpAddress']); def sport = pick(d, ['SourcePort','src_port','IpPort','port']); def shost = pick(d, ['SourceHostname']); if (sip != null || sport != null || shost != null) { ctx['source'] = ctx['source'] ?: [:]; if (sip != null) ctx.source['ip'] = sip; if (sport != null) ctx.source['port'] = sport.toString(); if (shost != null) ctx.source['domain'] = shost; } def proto = pick(d, ['Protocol','proto']); def dir = pick(d, ['Direction','Initiated']); if (proto != null || dir != null) { ctx['network'] = ctx['network'] ?: [:]; if (proto != null) ctx.network['transport'] = proto.toString(); if (dir != null) ctx.network['direction'] = dir; } def fpath = pick(d, ['TargetFilename','FileName','ObjectName','RelativeTargetName']); if (fpath != null) { ctx['file'] = ctx['file'] ?: [:]; ctx.file['path'] = fpath; ctx.file['name'] = basename(fpath); } def flpath = pick(d, ['ImageLoaded']); if (flpath != null) { ctx['dll'] = ['path': flpath, 'name': basename(flpath)]; } def regpath = pick(d, ['TargetObject']); if (regpath != null) { ctx['registry'] = ctx['registry'] ?: [:]; ctx.registry['path'] = regpath; def rparts = regpath.splitOnToken('\\'); ctx.registry['key'] = rparts[rparts.length - 1]; if (rparts.length > 1) ctx.registry['hive'] = rparts[0]; } def regval = pick(d, ['Details']); if (regval != null) { ctx['registry'] = ctx['registry'] ?: [:]; ctx.registry['data'] = ['strings': [regval]]; } def qname = pick(d, ['QueryName','dns_query']); def qres = pick(d, ['QueryResults']); def qstat = pick(d, ['QueryStatus']); if (qname != null) { ctx['dns'] = ['question': ['name': qname]]; if (qres != null) ctx.dns['answers'] = [['data': qres]]; if (qstat != null) ctx.dns['response_code'] = qstat; } def srcimg = pick(d, ['SourceImage']); def tgtimg = pick(d, ['TargetImage']); if (srcimg != null) { ctx.process['parent'] = ctx.process['parent'] ?: [:]; ctx.process.parent['executable'] = srcimg; ctx.process.parent['name'] = basename(srcimg); } if (tgtimg != null) { ctx['target'] = ['process': ['executable': tgtimg, 'name': basename(tgtimg)]]; def tpid = pick(d, ['TargetProcessId']); if (tpid != null) ctx.target.process['pid'] = tpid.toString(); } ctx['winlog'] = [:]; if (eid != null) ctx.winlog['event_id'] = eid.toString(); if (echan != null) ctx.winlog['channel'] = echan; def wtask = pick(d, ['Task']); if (wtask != null) ctx.winlog['task'] = wtask.toString(); if (hn != null) ctx.winlog['computer_name'] = hn; def logtype = pick(d, ['LogonType']); def logid = pick(d, ['TargetLogonId','LogonId','SubjectLogonId']); if (logtype != null || logid != null) { ctx.winlog['logon'] = [:]; if (logtype != null) ctx.winlog.logon['type'] = logtype; if (logid != null) ctx.winlog.logon['id'] = logid; } def svcname = pick(d, ['ServiceName','Service']); def svcfile = pick(d, ['ServiceFileName']); if (svcname != null) { ctx['service'] = ['name': svcname]; if (svcfile != null) ctx.service['executable'] = svcfile; } def tname = pick(d, ['TaskName']); if (tname != null) ctx['task'] = ['name': tname]; def pname = pick(d, ['PipeName']); if (pname != null) ctx['pipe'] = ['name': pname]; def sbt = pick(d, ['ScriptBlockText','ContextInfo','Payload']); if (sbt != null) ctx['script'] = ['text': sbt]; def sharename = pick(d, ['ShareName']); def sharepath = pick(d, ['ShareLocalPath']); if (sharename != null) { ctx['network'] = ctx['network'] ?: [:]; ctx.network['share'] = ['name': sharename]; if (sharepath != null) ctx.network.share['path'] = sharepath; } def tenant = pick(d, ['TenantId']); if (tenant != null) { ctx['cloud'] = ['account': ['id': tenant], 'provider': 'azure']; } def rel_ips = []; if (dip != null) rel_ips.add(dip); if (sip != null) rel_ips.add(sip); if (rel_ips.size() > 0) { ctx['related'] = ctx['related'] ?: [:]; ctx.related['ip'] = rel_ips; } def rel_hosts = []; if (hn != null) rel_hosts.add(hn.splitOnToken('.')[0]); if (dhost != null) rel_hosts.add(dhost); if (shost != null) rel_hosts.add(shost); if (rel_hosts.size() > 0) { ctx['related'] = ctx['related'] ?: [:]; ctx.related['hosts'] = rel_hosts; }
